ai_goal_gap_analysis.goal: RICH_S2_BLUEEDGE_PROJECTION — BlueEdge with full PATH A + PATH B governed genesis, rich LENS projection, and S2 qualification via governed lifecycle
ai_goal_gap_analysis.current_state: PARTIAL_WITH_OPEN_GAPS — 17/17 pipeline phases pass, but 4 critical semantic phases not exercised due to upstream structural gaps

gap_chain.title: TypeScript import blindness
gap_chain.root_cause: code_graph_feasibility.py uses Python ast module — cannot parse TypeScript
gap_chain.impact: 0 IMPORTS edges → no code graph (40.3s) → no centrality (40.3c) → no hero moments → degraded propositions → degraded governance friction → no revalidation → weakened S2 qualification evidence

gap_chain.title: Code graph absent (40.3s)
gap_chain.root_cause: GAP-TS-001 → no Python packages found → Phase 3.6 FAIL
gap_chain.impact: No resolved import relationships for BlueEdge TypeScript files

gap_chain.title: Centrality absent (40.3c)
gap_chain.impact: No structural role classification, no centrality ranking, no hero moment evidence

gap_chain.title: SPE propositions absent
gap_chain.root_cause: SPE requires reconciliation_state.json, BlueEdge uses grounding_state_v3 path. Two PATH A pipeline variants not yet unified.
gap_chain.impact: 0 propositions → FORMATION phase NOT_EXERCISED → no governance friction → TENSION NOT_EXERCISED → no revalidation material

gap_chain.title: Hero moments absent
gap_chain.root_cause: GAP-CT-003 → hero_moment_detector has no centrality or code graph evidence
gap_chain.impact: No structural surprises detected for BlueEdge

gap_chain.title: PATH A/B Fusion not exercised
gap_chain.root_cause: No contract exists for fusing PATH A structural evidence with PATH B semantic ontology within a single governed pipeline run
gap_chain.impact: BlueEdge has rich PATH B (17 domains, 42 capabilities, 89 components from RC streams) but genesis run cannot incorporate it. PATH A runs in isolation.
gap_chain.evidence: BlueEdge has CSR (candidate_csr.json from SDC), grounding_state_v3 (10 CEUs at SOURCE_TRUTH), replay chronicle (REPLAY-CERTIFIED). None of this enters the genesis pipeline.

correction_corridors.title: TypeScript PATH A Enrichment
correction_corridors.goal: Produce resolved IMPORTS edges for TypeScript files through 40.3s artifact contract

approach.strategy: Add TypeScript indexer to code_graph_feasibility.py alongside existing Python ast indexer. The 40.3s schema is already indexer-neutral — the contract does not change.

implementation_options.pros: C-native parser, no Node.js dependency, handles JSX/TSX, deterministic, well-maintained
implementation_options.cons: Requires py-tree-sitter + tree-sitter-typescript grammar installation. Symbol resolution for path aliases (tsconfig.json paths) needs custom logic.

implementation_options.pros: Full TypeScript compiler API, accurate path resolution including tsconfig paths, handles re-exports
implementation_options.cons: Requires Node.js, subprocess boundary, heavier dependency, non-deterministic install

implementation_options.pros: Zero dependency, immediate implementation, extends existing pattern
implementation_options.cons: Cannot resolve re-exports, path aliases, barrel imports. Quality ceiling well below ast-level extraction.
implementation_options.viability: LOW — structurally insufficient for code-graph claims

approach.recommended: tree-sitter-typescript — balances accuracy with deterministic, dependency-light operation

expected_evidence_uplift.import_edges: 2040-3400 estimated (680 TS files × 3-5 imports avg, based on NetBox density)
expected_evidence_uplift.centrality_ranking: 680 files ranked with structural role classification
expected_evidence_uplift.hero_moments: 3-8 candidates estimated (based on TS module coupling patterns)

correction_corridors.maturity_uplift_estimate: DISCOVERY + EMERGENCE phases become COMPLETE. BlueEdge PATH A topology transforms from containment-only (934 CONTAINS, 0 IMPORTS) to structurally rich (~3000 IMPORTS + 934 CONTAINS).
correction_corridors.replay_impact_assessment: Non-breaking. Existing containment topology preserved. New IMPORTS edges are additive. 40.3s schema unchanged. Pipeline Phase 3.6 already handles graceful degradation.
correction_corridors.governance_risk_assessment: LOW. Indexer-neutral schema means the architecture does not change. Only the set of supported languages grows.

correction_corridors.title: SPE Grounding-Path Bridge
correction_corridors.goal: Enable SPE proposition derivation for specimens using grounding_state_v3 path (not reconciliation_state)

approach.strategy: SPE currently requires reconciliation_state.json to enumerate confirmed CEUs. BlueEdge uses grounding_state_v3.json with a different CEU inventory format. Two options:

implementation_options.pros: Transforms grounding_state_v3 CEU format into SPE-consumable CEU list. Minimal change to SPE core. BlueEdge and future grounding-path clients immediately supported.
implementation_options.cons: Adapter must handle grounding_state_v3 schema variations. Less CEU metadata than reconciliation (no evidence_anchors, no obligation lineage).

implementation_options.pros: Synthesizes a reconciliation_state.json from grounding_state_v3 data. SPE consumes it without modification. Already proven pattern (StackStorm Phase 5 fix).
implementation_options.cons: Creates a derived artifact that may have incomplete fields. Synthesis is a projection — not genuine reconciliation.
implementation_options.viability: HIGH — already proven in run_client_pipeline.py Phase 5

approach.recommended: Reconciliation synthesis from grounding — already proven pattern, reuse _synthesize_ceu_registry_from_reconciliation() approach

expected_evidence_uplift.propositions: 30-50 estimated (10 CEUs × 3-5 propositions per CEU, similar to StackStorm density)

dependencies: CC-01 recommended but not required — propositions from centrality require CC-01, but grounding-tier propositions work without it
correction_corridors.maturity_uplift_estimate: FORMATION phase becomes COMPLETE. BlueEdge gains semantic proposition corpus for governance review.
correction_corridors.replay_impact_assessment: Non-breaking. SPE already handles no-reconciliation gracefully (SKIP). Adding grounding support is additive.
correction_corridors.governance_risk_assessment: LOW. Propositions still CANDIDATE/L3. No authority escalation.

correction_corridors.title: BlueEdge Full Genesis Re-Run
correction_corridors.goal: Re-execute BlueEdge through complete pipeline with CC-01 + CC-02 corrections, producing FULL_COGNITIVE_GENESIS (or near-full) corridor

approach.strategy: Fresh pipeline execution with TypeScript parser (CC-01) and SPE grounding bridge (CC-02) operational. Followed by operator governance review (propositions), evidence enrichment (if possible from HTML evidence), revalidation, and S2 candidate assessment.
execution_sequence: 1. Fresh source extraction (same archive, same SHA256)
2. 40.2 structural scan → 40.3 topology (now with IMPORTS) → 40.4 clusters
4. Phase 3c SPE with grounding bridge → propositions
5. Hero moment detection (now with centrality evidence)
6. Operator governance review of propositions (TENSION phase)
7. Evidence enrichment from 3 HTML files if SDC bridge available
9. S2 candidate assessment — does BlueEdge qualify via governed genesis?

resolves_gaps: All — comprehensive re-run after CC-01 + CC-02

phase_status_target.STRENGTHENING: COMPLETE (if HTML enrichment available) or ACTIVE
phase_status_target.QUALIFICATION: COMPLETE (if S2 assessment passes) or NOT_EXERCISED

correction_corridors.maturity_uplift_estimate: BlueEdge transforms from PARTIAL_WITH_OPEN_GAPS (2/9 active, 2/9 open gap) to near-FULL_COGNITIVE_GENESIS (7-8/9 active or complete). Convergence remains NOT_ELIGIBLE until second specimen genesis (GEN-6).
correction_corridors.replay_impact_assessment: New run — no existing artifact mutation. run_blueedge_genesis_e2e_02 alongside existing _01.
correction_corridors.governance_risk_assessment: MEDIUM. Operator governance review is genuinely manual. S2 assessment depends on proposition quality. Cannot guarantee outcome.

correction_corridors.title: LENS Rich Projection
correction_corridors.goal: Verify LENS v2 renders enriched BlueEdge data with full structural depth — topology with import edges, centrality visualization, proposition display, hero moment navigation

approach.strategy: After CC-03 produces enriched BlueEdge run, verify LENS projection surfaces consume the new evidence. Most LENS v2 components already handle these data types (proven on NetBox). The primary concern is binding envelope construction from enriched data.
verification_areas: Interactive SVG topology renders IMPORTS edges (not just containment)
Centrality-ranked file list appears in INVESTIGATION mode
Propositions appear in semantic governance sections
Hero moments surface in cognitive traversal
Pressure zones derive from import-enriched topology (not containment-only)
BOARDROOM narrative reflects structural depth improvement

expected_evidence_uplift.projection_depth: Containment-only topology → import-enriched structural intelligence surface
expected_evidence_uplift.user_visible: BlueEdge LENS v2 transitions from structural skeleton to rich structural intelligence projection

correction_corridors.maturity_uplift_estimate: PROJECTION phase reaches full operational depth. Executive audience sees governed structural intelligence, not just containment topology.
correction_corridors.replay_impact_assessment: Read-only — LENS consumes prepared payloads. No substrate mutation.
correction_corridors.governance_risk_assessment: LOW. Projection of existing governed evidence. No new authority claims.

critical_path: CC-01 (TypeScript parser) is the single root blocker. Everything else cascades from it.
non_goals: Do NOT implement TypeScript parser in this stream — this stream produces corridors, not implementation
Do NOT implement PATH A/B Fusion contract — Fusion is a separate architectural concern beyond the correction chain
Do NOT attempt S2 advancement — S2 is the outcome of CC-03, not this stream
Do NOT modify LENS v2 code — CC-04 is verification, not implementation
operator_governance_note: All corridors are CANDIDATE status at L3 authority ceiling. Operator approval required before any implementation stream begins. This document is advisory, replay-safe, lineage-bound, operator-governed, append-only.
